info.description: Multi-channel communications gateway bridging Meshtastic, Iridium, Cellular, APRS, TAK, MQTT, ZigBee, and Webhooks.
info.title: MeshSat API

post.description: Sends a factory reset command — all device state returned to defaults
Forwards a reboot command through HAL to a local or remote mesh node
Sends a traceroute to discover the path to a destination node
Exports all Hub configuration state (interfaces, rules, devices, contacts, encryption keys) as a ZIP archive. The backup is saved to disk and returned as a download.

get.description: Downloads a previously saved backup file by filename.
Returns a list of backup files stored on disk, newest first.

post.description: Uploads a backup ZIP and returns a diff summary showing what would be added, removed, or changed — without applying.
Uploads a backup ZIP and replaces all Hub configuration state. This is a full replace applied as a transaction. Use /api/backup/preview first to see what will change.

get.description: Returns the auto-backup schedule configuration.

put.description: Updates the auto-backup interval in hours. Set to 0 to disable. Takes effect on next restart.

get.description: Requests the device to send back its canned messages via admin channel

post.description: Sets the canned messages on the Meshtastic device. Messages are pipe-separated.
Configures a Meshtastic radio channel via HAL

get.description: Retrieves the full Meshtastic device configuration via HAL

post.description: Accepts a YAML document and returns a diff summary showing what would be added, removed, changed, or kept — without applying any changes.

get.description: Returns a YAML document containing all interfaces, access rules, object groups, and failover groups. Excludes runtime fields (device_id, device_port, counters, timestamps).

post.description: Accepts a YAML document and replaces all interfaces, access rules, object groups, and failover groups. This is a full replace (not merge) applied as a transaction.

200.description: Count of imported entities per type

post.description: Sends a module configuration update to the Meshtastic device via HAL

get.description: Requests a specific module config section (response arrives via config_complete SSE event)

parameters.description: Module section: mqtt, serial, external_notification, store_forward, range_test, telemetry, canned_message, audio, remote_hardware, neighbor_info
parameters.name: section

post.description: Sends a radio configuration update to the Meshtastic device via HAL

get.description: Requests a specific radio config section from the device (response arrives via config_complete SSE event)

parameters.description: Config section: device, position, power, network, display, lora, bluetooth, security
parameters.name: section

get.description: Returns all registered devices with computed status (online/offline/never_seen).

post.description: Registers a new device. Validates IMEI (15-digit Luhn check). Rejects duplicate IMEIs with 409.

get.description: Returns a single device by ID with computed status.

put.description: Updates label, type, and notes of an existing device.

get.description: Returns the latest YAML configuration version for a device, or 204 if no config exists.

put.description: Saves a new YAML configuration version for a device. The YAML is validated before saving.

post.description: Creates a new config version with the YAML content from the specified version.
post.summary: Rollback device configuration to a previous version

get.description: Returns all configuration versions for a device, newest first.
Returns a single configuration version by version number.
get.summary: Get a specific device configuration version

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream of real-time mesh events
Returns status and config of all gateways (MQTT, Iridium)
Returns status and config for a specific gateway type

delete.description: Stop and remove a gateway configuration

post.description: Start a configured gateway
Stop a running gateway
Test connectivity for a configured gateway

get.description: Returns all non-sent, non-cancelled messages in the DLQ

post.description: Enqueues a message in the DLQ; sent when signal becomes available
post.summary: Queue Iridium message for later send

delete.description: Permanently removes a dead letter entry from the database

post.description: Marks the queued message as cancelled; it will not be retried
Changes the send priority for a pending queued message
post.summary: Set priority for a queued Iridium message

get.description: Returns fresh satellite signal bars using AT+CSQ (blocks until modem responds)
Returns cached satellite signal bars using AT+CSQF (non-blocking)

post.summary: Initiate a link to a remote destination

get.description: Returns counters for hop limit drops, visited set drops, self-loop drops, and delivery dedups
Returns paginated mesh messages with optional filters

post.description: Sends a text message through the Meshtastic radio

get.description: Returns message counts grouped by transport and port number
Returns neighbor info data from all nodes that have sent NeighborInfo packets
Returns all known nodes from the Meshtastic radio's NodeDB

post.description: Sets a fixed GPS position on the Meshtastic device via admin message

delete.description: Removes the fixed GPS position from the Meshtastic device

post.description: Sends a Position packet to the mesh with the specified coordinates

get.description: Returns GPS track data for maps and position analysis
Returns stored range test results

post.description: Sends a range test packet to the mesh (portnum 66)

parameters.description: Range test text and optional destination
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns rate limit configuration for all devices.
Returns rate limit config and current usage for a specific device.
get.summary: Get satellite rate limit for a device

put.description: Creates or updates rate limit configuration for a device.
put.summary: Set satellite rate limit for a device

delete.description: Removes rate limit configuration, reverting to unlimited.
delete.summary: Delete satellite rate limit for a device

post.description: Sets a temporary override that bypasses rate limiting for the specified duration.
post.summary: Admin override: temporarily bypass rate limit

post.description: Clears all usage counters for a device (admin override).

get.description: Returns current usage stats for all devices with rate limits.
Returns current Meshtastic device connection status

post.description: Sends a CLIENT_HISTORY request to a Store & Forward server node to retrieve missed messages

parameters.description: S&F server node and history window in seconds
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns time-series telemetry data (battery, voltage, channel util, environment)
Returns nodes and inferred links for topology visualization

post.description: Sends a waypoint to the mesh network via HAL

Receives MO (Mobile Originated) messages from the RockBLOCK webhook service.
Verifies shared secret, hex-decodes payload, attempts SMAZ2 decompression,
and publishes to MQTT hub namespace topics (mo/raw, mo/decoded, position).

get.description: Returns all paired ZigBee devices with short address, IEEE address, LQI, and last seen time
Returns the ZigBee coordinator connection state, message counts, firmware version, and uptime

200.description: connected, running, messages_in, messages_out, errors, firmware, device_count

get.description: Returns MeshSat service health and database status

text_preview.description: plaintext for display (binary payload is not human-readable)
